name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand a stride-length in front of a bench and rest the top of your rear foot on it.
Holding a dumbbell in each hand, lower until your front thigh is roughly parallel to the floor, keeping the front knee tracking over the foot.
Drive through the front heel to stand back up. Finish all reps, then switch legs.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Sit with your back flat against the pad and forearms on the pads (or hands on the handles).
Squeeze your chest to bring the pads together in front of you.
Slowly reverse to a comfortable stretch and repeat.

name: Reverse Pec Deck
instructions: Sit facing the pad with arms extended forward holding the handles.
Drive the handles back in an arc by squeezing your rear delts and upper back.
Return under control and repeat.

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: Set up over a barbell with a flat back and hips high, torso roughly parallel to the floor.
Explosively row the bar to your lower chest, then return it to the floor each rep (dead-stop).
Keep the torso angle fixed throughout.

name: Chest Press Machine
instructions: Sit with the handles aligned to mid-chest and back flat against the pad.
Press the handles forward until your arms are nearly straight.
Return under control to a comfortable stretch and repeat.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench and grip the bar about shoulder-width apart.
Lower the bar to your lower chest, keeping your elbows tucked.
Press back up by extending the elbows, driving through the triceps.

name: Smith Machine Squat
instructions: Set the bar across your upper back with feet slightly forward of the bar path.
Unrack, then squat until your thighs are at least parallel.
Drive up through your whole foot and re-rack when finished.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand side-on to a low pulley and hold the handle in the outside hand.
Raise your arm out to the side to about shoulder height with a slight bend in the elbow.
Lower under control. Finish the set, then switch sides.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit with the handles at shoulder height and back against the pad.
Press the handles overhead until your arms are nearly straight.
Lower under control to shoulder height and repeat.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Sit with the pad on top of your lower shins and the back pad snug.
Curl your heels down and under by contracting your hamstrings.
Return under control to the start and repeat.
